frequency.description: Frequency

families.description: Query any EIA dataset. See catalog.json.routes for the full route tree + facet schema per dataset.
Route discovery. Each response lists sub-routes + available frequencies/facets at that level.
Enumerate facet values (e.g. region codes, fuel types) for a specific route+dimension.

routes.name: Mine State Aggregates
routes.description:
Coal shipments aggregated at state-level data, including price, 
        quantity, quality, and rank.  Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  
        https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Receipts
routes.description:
Coal shipment detailed by reciepient data, including transportation type, 
        supplier, mine, coal basin, county, state, rank, contract type, price, quantity, and quality. 
        Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Mine Aggregates
routes.description:
Coal shipments aggregated at mine-level data, 
        including price, quantity, quality, and rank.  Source: EIA Form 7A and 
        MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Plant State Aggregates
routes.description:
Coal reciepts aggregated at state-level data, including price, 
        quantity, quality, and rank.  Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive 
        browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Plant Aggregates
routes.description:
Coal reciepts aggregated to plant-level data, 
        including price, quantity, quality, and rank.  Source: EIA Form 7A 
            and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: By Mine, By Plant
routes.description: Coal shipments from mine- to plant-level data, including price, quantity, quality, and rank.  Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Consumption and Quality
routes.description:
Coal consumption and quality data by state and sector, 
            including price, reciepts, heat content, sulfur content, ash content, and stocks. 
            Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

facets.description: U.S. Total, States, and Census Regions.

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Aggregate Production
routes.description:
Coal state aggregated data by mine type, includes production, 
        productivity, labor hours, employees, and coal rank.  Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 
        7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Exports\Imports Quantity\Price
routes.description:
Coal import/export data, including price, quantity, country, 
        rank, and customs district.  Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive 
        browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Market Sales Price
routes.description:
Coal market sales prices and amounts by mine types for 
        regions and states (unless withheld for pricing protections).  Source: EIA Form 
            7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Mine Production
routes.description:
Coal mine-level data, including production, region, state, 
        county, rank, status, type, name and description.  Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA 
        Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Price by Rank
routes.description:
Coal prices by rank data for region and state.  
        Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser: 
        https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Reserves Capacity
routes.description:
Coal capacity data, including productive capacity, stocks, 
        and recoverable reserves by state, region and mine type.  Source: EIA Form 7A and 
        MSHA Form 7000-2.  Interactive browser:  https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Crude Oil Imports
routes.description:
Crude oil imports by country to destination, 
        includes type, grade, quantity.  Source: EIA-814  Interactive data 
        product:  www.eia.gov/petroleum/imports/companylevel/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Electricity Sales to Ultimate Customers
routes.description:
Electricity sales to ultimate customer by state and sector (number of customers, average price, revenue, and megawatthours of sales).  
    Sources: Forms EIA-826, EIA-861, EIA-861M

frequency.description: One data point for each month.
One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Electric Power Operations (Annual and Monthly)
routes.description:
Monthly and annual electric power operations by state, sector, and energy source.
    Source: Form EIA-923

frequency.description: One data point for each month.
One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Electric Power Operations (Daily and Hourly)
routes.description:
Hourly and daily electric power operations by balancing authority.  
    Source: Form EIA-930

routes.name: Hourly Demand, Demand Forecast, Generation, and Interchange
routes.description:
Hourly demand, day-ahead demand forecast, net generation, and interchange by balancing authority.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each hour in UTC time.
One data point for each hour in local time.

routes.name: Hourly Generation by Energy Source
routes.description:
Hourly net generation by balancing authority and energy source.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each hour in UTC time.
One data point for each hour in local time.

routes.name: Hourly Demand by Subregion
routes.description:
Hourly demand by balancing authority subregion.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each hour in UTC time.
One data point for each hour in local time.

routes.name: Hourly Interchange by Neighboring Balancing Authority
routes.description:
Daily interchange between neighboring balancing authorities.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each hour in UTC time.
One data point for each hour in local time.

routes.name: Daily Demand, Demand Forecast, Generation, and Interchange
routes.description:
Daily demand, day-ahead demand forecast, net generation, and interchange by balancing authority.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each day.

routes.name: Daily Demand by Subregion
routes.description:
Daily demand by balancing authority subregion.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each day.

routes.name: Daily Generation by Energy Source
routes.description:
Daily net generation by balancing authority and energy source.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each day.

routes.name: Daily Interchange by Neighboring Balancing Authority
routes.description:
Hourly interchange between neighboring balancing authorities.  
    Source: Form EIA-930
    Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

frequency.description: One data point for each day.

routes.name: Emissions from Energy Consumption at Conventional Power Plants and Combined-Heat-and-Power Plants
routes.description:
Emissions from electricity generation and the production of useful thermal output at conventional power plants and combined-heat-and-power plants.
    See Electric Power Annual, Technical Notes for a description of the sources and methodology used to develop the emissions estimates.
    Sources: Forms EIA-860, EIA-923, and calculations made by the Office of  Energy Production, Conversion & Delivery (EPCD)
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 7

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Supply and disposition of electricity
routes.description:
Supply and disposition of electricity by state.
    Sources: Forms EIA-860, EIA-861, and EIA-923
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 10

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Generating Capacity
routes.description:
Electric generating capacity (summer capacity) by state, energy source, and sector.
    Source: Form EIA-860
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 4

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Costs and Savings from Energy Efficiency Programs
routes.description:
Costs and savings from energy efficiency programs by state and sector
    Source: Form EIA-861
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 13

facets.description: Time Period Included in Costs and Savings

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Electricity Net Metering: Customers and Capacity
routes.description:
Electricity net metering customer counts and capacity by state, sector, and generating technology.
    Source: Form EIA-861
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 11

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Advanced Metering Infrastructure
routes.description:
Advanced meterting counts by technology, state, and sector
    Source: Forms EIA-861, EIA-861S
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 12

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: State Rankings for Key Statistics
routes.description:
State rankings for key electricity statistics by state
    Source: Forms EIA-860, EIA-861, EIA-923
    Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 1

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Inventory of Operable Generators
routes.description:
Inventory of operable generators in the U.S.
    Source: Forms EIA-860, EIA-860M

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Electric Power Operations for Individual Power Plants (Annual and Monthly)
routes.description:
Annual and monthly electric power operations for individual power plants, by energy source and prime mover
    Source: Form EIA-923

frequency.description: One data point for each month.
One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: International
routes.description:
Country level production, consumption, imports, exports by energy source (petroleum, natural gas, electricity, renewable, etc.)  
        Interactive product:  https://www.eia.gov/international/data/world

routes.name: U.S. Nuclear Outages
routes.description:
Nuclear outages daily with capacity, outages, and percent outage.  
        Source:   Nuclear Regulatory Commission's Power Reactor Status Report.  
        Interactive data report:  Daily Status of Nuclear Reactors.

frequency.description: One data point for each day.

routes.name: Generator Level Nuclear Outages
routes.description:

        Source:   Nuclear Regulatory Commission's Power Reactor Status Report.  
        Interactive data report:  Daily Status of Nuclear Reactors.

frequency.description: One data point for each day.

routes.name: Facility Level Nuclear Outages
routes.description:
Facility level nuclear outages with capacity, outages, and percent outage.  
        Source:   Nuclear Regulatory Commission's Power Reactor Status Report.  
        Interactive data report:  Daily Status of Nuclear Reactors.

routes.name: State Energy Data System (SEDS)
routes.description:
Estimated production, consumption, price, and expenditure data for all energy sources by state and sector.  
        Source:  https://www.eia.gov/state/seds/seds-technical-notes-complete.php  
        Product:  SEDS (https://www.eia.gov/state/seds/)

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Short Term Energy Outlook
routes.description:
Monthly short term (18 month) projections using STEO model.  
        Report and interactive projection data browser:  STEO (www.eia.gov/steo/)

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.
One data point every 3 months.
One data point for each month.

routes.name: Capacity by Region
routes.description:
Densified biomass capacity includes number of facilities 
        and number of employees.  Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Sales and Price by Region
routes.description:
Densified biomass sales and average price by region.  
        Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Export Sales and Price
routes.description:
Densified biomass export prices and quantity.  
        Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Feedstocks and Costs
routes.description:
Densified biomass feedstocks and cost by type.  
        Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Production by Region
routes.description:
Densified biomass production by region and fuel type.  
        Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Characteristics by Region
routes.description:
Densified biomass characteristics includes 
        fuel type, average ash, heat, and moisture content by region. 
        Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Inventories by Region
routes.description:
Densified biomass inventories by region and fuel type.  
        Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each month.

routes.name: Wood Pellet Plant Capacity
routes.description:
Details on wood pellet plants includes region, respondent, 
    capacity, and status.  Source: EIA-63C  Report:  www.eia.gov/biomass/

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: Total Energy
routes.description: These data represent the most recent comprehensive energy statistics integrated across all energy sources.  The data includes total energy production, consumption, stocks, and trade; energy prices; overviews of petroleum, natural gas, coal, electricity, nuclear energy, renewable energy, and carbon dioxide emissions; and data unit conversions values.  Source: https://www.eia.gov/totalenergy/data/monthly/pdf/mer_a_doc.pdf  Report:  MER (https://www.eia.gov/totalenergy/data/monthly/)

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.
One data point for each month.

routes.name: Annual Energy Outlook
routes.description: Annual U.S. projections using National Energy Modelling System (NEMS) for release year.  Report, documentation, and interactive projection data browser:  AEO (www.eia.gov/aeo/)

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: International Energy Outlook
routes.description: Annual international projections using the World Energy Projection System (WEPS) model for release year.  Report and interactive projection data browser:  IEO (www.eia.gov/ieo/)

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.
One data point for each calendar year.
One data point for each calendar year.
One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: State CO2 Emissions- deprecated: see SEDS
routes.description:
EIA CO2 Emissions data. "This route is deprecated and no longer receiving fresh data. 
    For state-level CO2 emissions data, please use the /v2/seds/ API route.

routes.name: Total CO2 Emissions by Sector and Fuel - deprecated: see SEDS
routes.description:
CO2 emission aggregates by fuel, state, and sector.  Report and documentation: https://www.eia.gov/environment/emissions/state/. "This route is deprecated and no longer receiving fresh data.
     For state-level CO2 emissions data, please use the /v2/seds/ API route.

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.

routes.name: CO2 Emissions and Carbon Coefficients by Product - deprecated: see SEDS
routes.description:
CO2 emissions and carbon coefficients by fuel, state, and sector. Report and documentation: https://www.eia.gov/environment/emissions/state/.
    "This route is deprecated and no longer receiving fresh data. For state-level CO2 emissions data, please use the /v2/seds/ API route.

frequency.description: One data point for each calendar year.
